headline: Top Technology Executives Recognized at the 2026 Tennessee ORBIE Awards
summary: Leading CIOs and CISOs honored for leadership, innovation, enterprise security, and business impact. NASHVILLE, May 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The 2026 Tennessee ORBIE Awards honored leading chief information officers (CIOs) and chief information security officers (CISOs) from FedEx (ret), Nissan Americas, ALSAC/St. Jude Children's Research Hospital, Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman, Meharry Medical College, University of Tennessee, and National HealthCare Corporation for their exceptional lead
